misc.title: Zoro is the most popular in Japan.🔥 Oda doesn't love that.🥺 Oda (1999): I'm glad Luffy won in the popularity poll. I was worried he might get surpassed by Zoro or Shanks. I participated in Film Z si
misc.text: Zoro is the most popular in Japan.🔥 Oda doesn't love that.🥺 Oda (1999): I'm glad Luffy won in the popularity poll. I was worried he might get surpassed by Zoro or Shanks. I participated in Film Z since I wanted to protect Luffy. (2018): Luffy is an ideal kid for me.
